title: Hamiltonian Complexity: QMA-Completeness
description: Explore the complexity of quantum Hamiltonian problems, the QMA complexity class, and the quantum analog of NP-completeness.
learningObjectives: Define QMA and understand its role as quantum NP
Understand the Local Hamiltonian problem and its significance
Learn the Kitaev proof of QMA-completeness
Study variants: QMA(2), QCMA, and their relationships
Connect Hamiltonian complexity to physics and chemistry
